content: hashmatch  Table of contents Prototype: hashmatch(filename, algorithm, hash) Return type: boolean Description: Compute the hash of file filename using the hash algorithm and test if it matches hash . This function may be used to determine whether a system has a particular version of a binary file (e.g. software patch). Arguments: filename : string - Filename to hash - in the range: "?(/.*) algorithm : - Hash or digest algorithm - one of md5 sha1 sha256 sha384 sha512 hash : string - ASCII representation of hash for comparison - in the range: [a-zA-Z0-9_$(){}\[\].:]+ hash is an ASCII representation of the hash for comparison. Example: code bundle agent example { classes : "matches" expression => hashmatch ( "/etc/passwd" , "md5" , "c5068b7c2b1707f8939b283a2758a691" ); reports : matches :: "File has correct version" ; }
